subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst manifest Thy Beauty unto the people of Thy kingdom and didst send [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به اظهرت جمالک لاهل مملکتک و ارسلت علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for detachment
